result.stdout:
Description:
  DotnetDeployer - Deploy .NET projects to NuGet and GitHub

Usage:
  DotnetDeployer.Tool [options]

Options:
  -c, --config <config>                    Path to deployer.yaml configuration file [default: deployer.yaml]
  -n, --dry-run                            Simulate deployment without making changes
  -v, --release-version <release-version>  Override version for the release
  -?, -h, --help                           Show help and usage information
  --version                                Show version information

commands.payload:
Description:
  DotnetDeployer - Deploy .NET projects to NuGet and GitHub

Usage:
  DotnetDeployer.Tool [options]

Options:
  -c, --config <config>                    Path to deployer.yaml configuration file [default: deployer.yaml]
  -n, --dry-run                            Simulate deployment without making changes
  -v, --release-version <release-version>  Override version for the release
  -?, -h, --help                           Show help and usage information
  --version                                Show version information
